title: Agents are giving bad advice, new study finds
description: Artificial intelligence chatbots are so prone to flattering and validating their human users that they are giving bad advice that can damage relationships and reinforce harmful behaviors, according to a new study that explores the dangers of AI telling people what they want to hear.

title: US stocks: Apple plans to open Siri to rival AI services, Bloomberg News reports
description: Apple is set to open its Siri voice assistant to other artificial intelligence services. This move will allow users to connect with AI platforms like Alphabet's Gemini and Anthropic's Claude directly through Siri. The change aims to boost Apple's AI capabilities and position the iPhone as a versatile AI hub.

title: Apple plans to open Siri to rival AI services, Bloomberg News reports
description: Apple plans to open its Siri voice assistant to rival artificial intelligence services beyond its current ​partnership with ChatGPT, Bloomberg News reported on ‌Thursday, citing people familiar with the matter.
content: The move, expected as part of Apple's iOS 27 update, would allow third-party AI ​apps to integrate directly with Siri, enabling ​users to route queries to services such as ⁠Alphabet's Gemini or Anthropic's Claude from within the ​assistant, according... [934 chars]
